block-end.name: keyword.control.end.plainenglish
block-end.match: (?i)\b(End if|End repeat|End while|End for each|End function)\b

keyword.name: keyword.other.plainenglish
keyword.match: (?i)\b(Let|Set|to|be|then|times|repeat|in|that takes|with|and store it in|a list containing|an empty list|Give back|Call|Use)\b

function-keyword.name: keyword.declaration.plainenglish
function-keyword.match: (?i)\b(Define a function called|End function|Give back|Call|the result of calling)\b

io-keyword.name: support.function.plainenglish
io-keyword.match: (?i)\b(Display|Ask|and store it in|round|floor|ceiling|square root|power|absolute value|minimum|maximum|create window|set background|draw rectangle|draw circle|update display|wait|close window|set colour|check events|is key pressed|mouse position|is mouse pressed|random integer|random decimal|random choice|current time|current date|unix timestamp|sleep|uppercase|lowercase|length of text|replace text|split text|read file|write file|append file|file exists|operating system|current directory|shell|create dictionary|put in dictionary|get from dictionary|remove from dictionary|dictionary keys|fetch url|download file|parse json|to json string|type of|to text|to number|regex match|regex search|regex replace|regex split|read csv|write csv|base64 encode|base64 decode|md5 hash|sha256 hash|show info|show error|ask yes no|ask string|connect to database|execute sql|fetch query|close database)\b

list-keyword.name: support.type.plainenglish
list-keyword.match: (?i)\b(Add|Remove|from|to|the length of|item|of|a list containing|an empty list)\b

comparison.name: keyword.operator.comparison.plainenglish
comparison.match: (?i)\b(is equal to|is not equal to|is greater than or equal to|is less than or equal to|is greater than|is less than|is true|is false|and|or)\b
